mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_messages WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND ((sender_id = #{userId} AND sender_type = 0) OR (sender_id = #{adminId} AND sender_type = 1)) ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT cm.sender_id AS userId, '' AS userName, cm.product_id AS productId, '' AS productName, (SELECT content FROM chat_messages cm2 WHERE cm2.product_id = cm.product_id AND cm2.sender_id = cm.sender_id AND cm2.sender_type = 0 ORDER BY cm2.create_time DESC LIMIT 1) AS lastMessage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages cm3 WHERE cm3.product_id = cm.product_id AND cm3.sender_id = cm.sender_id AND cm3.sender_type = 0 AND cm3.is_read = 0) AS unreadCount, (SELECT MIN(cm4.create_time) FROM chat_messages cm4 WHERE cm4.product_id = cm.product_id AND cm4.sender_id = cm.sender_id AND cm4.sender_type = 0) AS lastTime FROM chat_messages cm WHERE cm.sender_type = 0 GROUP BY cm.sender_id, cm.product_id ORDER BY lastTime DESC
